item.title: Saturday WHOLESOME dump of smiles and good feelings #721
item.description:
1. Aww, that careful little bite not to hurt the kid... such a nice doggie
2. Pigeon: Yo that's my jam
3. Kitty: MINE
4. Smol pup
5. Stan Lee legit fangirling over Wolverine
6. Taking match photos with a 100 year old camera
7. All aboard the doggy bus!
8. AMAZING! Wish books would come stuff like this, I would buy so hard
9.
10. Labs and water!
11. She is a literal homewrecker!
12. Just sitting and enjoying life
13
14. The satisfying sounds of turning on game consoles :)))
5. Hello friendos, for the 20 months, I’ve been working on a game that’s very close to my heart. "Do Not Press The Button Or You'll Delete The Multiverse" is a quirky adventure crafted with love and passion by two brothers who grew up neglecting their homework and playing PC and NES games. (Legit the biggest punishment that our parents could dish out at us was not to ground us but take away the PC monitor :D ). As indie developers, we rely on your support to bring our game toa life. By adding it to your wishlist, you’re helping us reach more players and make a big impact in the gaming community. https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Yes, you can play with this dapper gentlemen right here : )
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: What Happened Today #21
item.description: Thank you, Imgur! Your notes and comments touch me, and I'm glad so many of you are finding value. We can do this together. The judiciary is (mostly) holding firm. From mass firings to court battles, Trump’s latest moves are shaking up the country. Get caught up—and take action. LINKS 1 - https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/clyr2xvn4dpo 2 - https://www.cnn.com/2025/02/21/politics/trump-fires-top-us-general-cq-brown/index.html 3 - https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/feb/21/pentagon-layoffs-civilian-workers 4 - https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/us/judge-temporarily-blocks-key-parts-of-trump-s-executive-orders-targeting-dei/ar-AA1zy4yE 5 - https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5158174-trump-ice-director-deportations/ 6 - https://www.cbsnews.com/news/supreme-court-trump-special-counsel/ 7 - https://denvergazette.com/news/nation-world/judge-extends-block-on-musks-doge-from-treasury-systems/article_364172d1-8ed3-5e92-97b7-87889168d75b.html 8 - https://www.axios.com/2025/02/21/steve-bannon-cpac-nazi-salute-french-leader 9 - https://apnews.com/article/proud-boys-leader-enrique-tarrio-arrested-a1b88e26b17e21193fbf92ad0e9a65e2 10 - https://www.newsweek.com/doj-ethics-complaint-judge-ana-reyes-2034721 11 - https://www.npr.org/2025/02/21/nx-s1-5305226/ap-sues-white-house-gulf-of-america-mexico-trump 12 - https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/trump-administration/federal-judge-gives-go-ahead-trump-gut-usaid-workforce-rcna193262 Fighting Back - https://thehill.com/homenews/state-watch/5157818-trump-janet-mills-maine-transgender-athletes/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Trump is the "Federal Law" and threatens Maine.
item.description: Trump signed an Executive Order stating that he and the Attorney General decide the law. https://imgur.com/gallery/trump-is-law-6Y72OcU Trump threatens the Maine Governer for following State and Federal laws instead of Trump's bigoted Executive Order.

item.title: "French is so romantic" tutorial - YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://youtube.com/shorts/d1KbUrn6PPA Hi friends, Today I thought I'd give you a little French lesson! Hope it gets useful for your next online gaming session :) I always get the same comments under these videos, here are some pre-emptive answers : "Are you French Canadian? Are you from Quebec?" No, I was born in France, also lived in Belgium and I'm currently living in West Canada. "ThIs iS nOt the ExAct trAnsLatiOn!!!!" Yup, this is what's called a "dynamic equivalence" in translation, which only a native speaker could teach you, as opposed to a literal google translation. "French is so hard" It is hard for native French speakers as well, believe me. If you think English speakers are bad at spelling English, you have no idea how much worse it is for French natives in their own language. "Should I learn French?" No, don't do that to yourself, please. I only speak it because it is my native language. I would have never learned it as a second language, spare yourself the pain. Have a good day everyone!!!
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: Seven Of Nine
item.dc:creator: redghost999

item.title: Share this with every senator.
item.description: Source: https://bsky.app/profile/anildash.com/post/3lioxrw4k622l --------------------------------------------------------------------- Other stories from today (Imported from previous post) --------------------------------------------------------------------- Donald Trump Called 'Megalomaniac' By Angry Local at Republican Town Hall https://www.newsweek.com/donald-trump-georgia-town-hall-republicans-megalomaniac-2034234 GOP Rep. Rich McCormick Faces Furious Locals in Town Hall DOGE Mega Backlash https://www.thedailybeast.com/gop-rep-rich-mccormick-faces-furious-locals-in-town-hall-event-gone-wrong/ Kash Patel Says He Never Promoted QAnon. Here Are All The Times He Did https://archive.ph/td1a6#selection-553.0-553.70 83 percent of Americans disapprove of Trump’s Jan. 6 pardons: Poll https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5157765-donald-trump-jan-6-pardons-wapo-survey/ Donald Trump Polling Worse on The Economy Than Any Recent President https://www.newsweek.com/donald-trump-economy-polling-vs-recent-presidents-2033865 Trump Blows Up After Onslaught of Devastating Polls https://newrepublic.com/post/191830/trump-reaction-polls-approval Trump generously makes up an approval rating for himself, defying reality https://www.msnbc.com/rachel-maddow-show/maddowblog/trump-generously-makes-approval-rating-defying-reality-rcna193139 Bannon Does His Own Questionable Salute While Calling for a Third Trump Term https://www.thedailybeast.com/bannon-does-his-own-questionable-salute-while-calling-for-a-third-trump-term/ French leader cancels CPAC speech after Bannon's apparent Nazi salute https://www.axios.com/2025/02/21/steve-bannon-cpac-nazi-salute-french-leader Irish Leaders to Boycott St Patrick's Day Celebrations at White House https://www.newsweek.com/irish-leaders-boycott-st-patricks-day-celebrations-white-house-2034275 Trump’s attempts to denigrate Zelenskyy have led to a surge in Ukrainian unity https://apnews.com/article/ukraine-russia-trump-zelenskyy-putin-c0790f9054c6c69d698ed9aa816158ac ‘Very, Very Bad’: Ex-Government Economist Makes Bleakest Trump Prediction https://www.huffpost.com/entry/jesse-rothstein-prediction-trump-economy_n_67b84761e4b05145b9c532f7 Trump’s revolution will end badly — for himself, and for America https://thehill.com/opinion/campaign/5155580-trumps-revolution-will-end-badly-for-himself-and-for-america/ Elon Musk Hits Astronaut With Shocking Slur After Being Slammed Over ‘Lie’ https://www.thedailybeast.com/elon-musk-calls-astronaut-andreas-morgensen-fully-retarded-after-being-slammed-over-lie/ Musk and Hannity Talk Right Over Trump in Awkward Fox News Interview https://www.thedailybeast.com/musk-talks-over-trump-as-hannity-blanks-president-in-awkward-fox-interview/ Elon Musk’s ‘Cringe AF’ CPAC Stunt Is Mercilessly Mocked Online https://www.huffpost.com/entry/elon-musk-cpac-stage-stunt_n_67b8669ae4b09eb9376ff112 Ohio GOP Rep. Balderson says Trump's executive orders 'getting out of control' https://www.dispatch.com/story/news/politics/2025/02/20/trump-executive-orders-troy-balderson-ohio-congress-gop-republican/79329526007/ Staff at multiple agencies instructed not to speak to Congress, says Democrat https://thehill.com/homenews/house/5157303-congress-dems-concerns-ban-employees/ Ex-Proud Boys leader Enrique Tarrio arrested near Capitol https://thehill.com/regulation/court-battles/5158030-proud-boys-enrique-tarrio-arrested/amp/ Trump did not understand Pearl Harbor, new book reveals: ‘What’s this all about?’ https://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/americas/us-politics/trump-pearl-harbor-new-book-very-stable-genius-b2700639.html Judge again orders US to unfreeze foreign aid, stops short of contempt https://www.reuters.com/world/us/judge-again-orders-us-unfreeze-foreign-aid-stops-short-contempt-2025-02-20/ "He's not standing up": Protesters want Hakeem Jeffries to lead an aggressive opposition to Trump https://www.salon.com/2025/02/21/hes-not-standing-up-want-hakeem-jeffries-to-lead-an-aggressive-opposition-to/ Republican Senator Ripped for Promoting Measles Vaccine Amid Texas Outbreak After RFK Confirmation: 'Unfortunately You Voted for an Anti-Vaxxer' https://www.latintimes.com/republican-senator-ripped-promoting-measles-vaccine-amid-texas-outbreak-rfk-confirmation-anti-vaxxer-576283 Sanders Has a Message for Working-Class Trump Supporters: 'They're Going After You' https://www.commondreams.org/news/bernie-sanders-warning-trump-supporters MAGA's not-so-secret weapon: "Major media are a key tool for Trump’s destruction of the government" https://www.salon.com/2025/02/21/magas-not-so-secret-weapon-major-media-are-a-key-tool-for-trumps-destruction-of-the-government/ Trump again raises idea of running for an unconstitutional third term https://archive.ph/Zt13D Hunter Schafer’s Passport Gender Changed After Anti-Trans Trump Order: ‘F-ck This Administration’ https://archive.ph/ZQBSd --------------------------------------------------------------------- If there is an article that seems important but you cannot read, do not give up. Copy the title and put it in a search engine to find and alternative source that has pulled that story's text. archive.ph often allows you to put an address to the article to bypass this. To make things even simpler, there are block lists that you can add to UBlock to open these documents directly. You can use these links on PC, Mac and Android. You can drop this filter list directly into UBlock and it will allow you through (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/liamengland1/miscfilters/refs/heads/master/antipaywall.txt). This list is updated regularly, with an update just two days ago. I will provide a video that shows how to do this however, due to the compression methods here, it shows up a bit low quality but it is enough to easily figure it out. (https://imgur.com/gallery/land-of-free-to-yuh-72f1Fuq) It's recommended to use a browser other than Chrome in order to navigate. Recently, Google has been combatting against ad blockers (convenient, huh?) and from what I understand, they have removed extensions. Some on previous versions may still have access but it is only temporary and deemed unreliable on that basis. --------------------------------------------------------------------- NeatURL is an extension to help remove clutter and tracking from urls (https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/neat-url/). ClearURL is also an alternative (however I haven't tried it, it's #1 in the store) https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/clearurls/ If you're okay with manually enabling/disabling what is displayed, I recommend NoScript Security Suite to put full control into your hands. Note, it can be bothersome at first, but once you set permissions on each page that you visit frequently, you don't have to mess around with doing it over and over. Protection isn't meant to be convenient in this age, unfortunately. https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/noscript/ XCancelled will forward you to Twitter comments outside of the environment, allowing you to view information without being signed in. This is incredibly useful for news stories that contain "Tweets" so you can see their comments or download videos from their sources (with other tools) https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/nitter/ Load Reddit Images Directly does just that. Rather than clicking an image to slowly have it converted to a different format (many times unusable and needs to be converted back resulting in degradation), it will open in a new tab as .jpg https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/load-reddit-images-directly/ Chrome Mask will trick sites into thinking you're using Chrome for certain tasks. YouTube is a good example- to combat adblockers, they have limited their videos to those who they detect are using browsers that allow adblockers. There is a toggle switch for how you would like your browser to be announced. https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/chrome-mask Onetab is also useful but you can end up with tons and tons to "look over later" as I often do. https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/onetab/ Tab session manager- same as above. (I also have a hundreds here that I haven't gotten around to) https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/tab-session-manager/ For editing posts, if you do not have Photoshop, there is a browser-based alternative you can use completely for free with (practically) all of the bells and whistles. https://www.photopea.com/ If there is text on the screen and you cannot copy it, try Text-Grab. (my hotkey is alt+f) https://github.com/TheJoeFin/Text-Grab --------------------------------------------------------------------- Stay in the Fight! https://actionnetwork.org/forms/thank-you-for-taking-action-stay-in-the-fight/ Keep up with current threats: https://www.realtimefascism.com/ How far along are we to fascism? https://www.project2025.observer/ Support Ukraine! https://americancoalitionforukraine.org/ Another useful sub: https://old.reddit.com/r/Keep_Track/ Contact your representatives in Washington (yes, even if your representatives are Republicans. In fact, ESPECIALLY if they are) for any and all that concerns you. Here is a number for the Capitol switchboard, they'll patch you right through: (202)-224-3121 https://5calls.org/ On the Play store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.a5calls.android.a5calls https://generalstrikeus.com/ Litigation Tracker: Legal Challenges to Trump Administration Actions https://www.justsecurity.org/107087/tracker-legal-challenges-trump-administration-actions/ Keep an eye on the Executive Actions & Legislation. Question each one. https://potustracker.us/ How much is he golfing? https://trumpgolftrack.com/ Keep up with everything happening here: https://old.reddit.com/r/politics/ https://old.reddit.com/r/fednews/ Pardons for criminals, by criminals (ongoing): https://www.justice.gov/pardon Pardons for criminals, by criminals (1st term): https://www.justice.gov/pardon/pardons-granted-president-donald-j-trump-2017-2021 Fox puppets laying out how to steal an election before actively commanding it: https://imgur.com/gallery/sQzDOlI Brought to you by: "The best people" https://www.dailykos.com/history/user/CajsaLilliehook
item.dc:creator: BlasphemousJones
